all_games.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates' pitching staff dominated the Chicago Cubs, with Shota Imanaga tossing six scoreless innings. Bryan Reynolds' solo home run proved to be the difference-maker.
The Arizona Diamondbacks edged out the Philadelphia Phillies in a back-and-forth contest. Brandon Marsh's three-run homer gave the Diamondbacks the lead, and they held on for the win.
The Detroit Tigers' pitching staff shut down the Miami Marlins, with Keider Montero tossing six scoreless innings. Javier Báez's solo home run was the only offense the Marlins could muster.
The Los Angeles Angels' offense exploded for 10 runs, with Jorge Soler hitting a four-RBI homer. The Angels' pitching staff was able to hold off the Cincinnati Reds.
The Toronto Blue Jays' offense was too much for the Minnesota Twins, with Ryan Jeffers hitting a three-RBI homer. The Blue Jays' pitching staff held off the Twins' late rally.
The Athletics' pitching staff shut down the New York Mets, with Jacob Wilson collecting three hits. The Athletics' offense was able to hold off the Mets' late rally.

all_games.game: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
all_games.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays' offense was too much for the New York Yankees, with Yandy Díaz hitting a two-RBI homer. The Rays' pitching staff held off the Yankees' late rally.
The San Francisco Giants' offense was able to hold off the Baltimore Orioles, with Willy Adames hitting a two-RBI homer. The Giants' pitching staff held off the Orioles' late rally.

all_games.top_batting_line: Ronald Acuña Jr.: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI
all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves' offense exploded for 11 runs, with Ronald Acuña Jr. hitting a two-RBI homer. The Braves' pitching staff held off the Cleveland Guardians' late rally.

all_games.game: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals
all_games.summary: The Kansas City Royals' pitching staff shut down the Chicago White Sox, with Kris Bubic tossing seven scoreless innings. Carter Jensen's solo home run was the only offense the White Sox could muster.
The Washington Nationals' offense was able to hold off the Milwaukee Brewers, with Jake Bauers hitting a three-RBI homer. The Nationals' pitching staff held off the Brewers' late rally.

all_games.game: Boston Red Sox @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals' pitching staff held off the Boston Red Sox, with Connelly Early tossing 4.1 scoreless innings. The Cardinals' offense was able to hold off the Red Sox' late rally.
The San Diego Padres' offense was too much for the Colorado Rockies, with Gavin Sheets hitting two home runs. The Padres' pitching staff held off the Rockies' late rally.
The Seattle Mariners' offense exploded for nine runs, with Yordan Alvarez hitting a three-RBI homer. The Mariners' pitching staff held off the Houston Astros' late rally.
The Los Angeles Dodgers' offense was able to hold off the Texas Rangers, with Corey Seager hitting a three-RBI homer. The Dodgers' pitching staff held off the Rangers' late rally.
